name: Beans Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the dried pinto beans in a pressure cooker until tender (about 20 minutes).
2. Add the peeled and chopped potatoes and celery.
3. Cook until the potatoes are tender (approximately 4 minutes at high altitude).
4. Season with salt to taste.
5. Sauté the sliced onion until browned, then mix it with the beans and potatoes.
